summary: Full e2e tested AprovaMed Planner. Backend: 20/20 pytest pass (auth, dashboard, profile, CRUD on tasks/revisoes/schedule/questoes/redacoes/simulados/vestibulares, computed fields via /questoes2 /redacoes2 /simulados2). Frontend: login with demo creds, dashboard renders stats (160 dias, 1/5 tarefas, 3 revisoes, ultima redacao 860, ultimo simulado 69.44%), all 8 tabs navigate, theme toggle works (dark class on html), recharts render in Redacao and Simulados pages.

issues: Recharts emits width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on initial render before container has dimensions; chart still renders correctly but warnings flood console - consider min-height on ResponsiveContainer parent

action_items: (Optional) Fix Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) console warnings by giving ResponsiveContainer a parent with explicit min-height
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event startup/shutdown (FastAPI lifespan recommended)
CORS allow_credentials=True with allow_origins='*' is technically invalid per CORS spec; restrict origins when credentials are used
Demo seed mutates state on startup; idempotent except for password reset which is fine

Both /questoes and /questoes2 (and redacoes/simulados) routes exist - /questoes POST creates without computing erros/percentual which is inconsistent; consider removing the auto-generated POST or computing in the factory
seed_data_creation: Demo user auto-seeded by backend on startup with full sample data (tasks, revisoes, schedule, 8 questoes, 3 redacoes, 3 simulados, 3 vestibulares).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all critical endpoints. Demo creds seeded on startup. All 20 tests pass. Use BASE_URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
